    ensures

reason: An "empty" page table still has cr3 in its page_closure since l4_table dom is never emptied by is_empty — the page_closure of an empty page table is non-empty, breaking the intuition that empty means no resources held

proof fn phi_5_container_map_4k_unconstrained_ghost(pa: PageAllocator, c1: ContainerPtr, c2: ContainerPtr, p: PagePtr)
    requires
        c1 != c2,
        pa.container_map_4k@.dom().contains(c1),
        pa.container_map_4k@.dom().contains(c2),
        pa.container_map_4k@[c1].contains(p),
    ensures
        !pa.container_map_4k@[c2].contains(p) || pa.container_map_4k@[c2].contains(p),
{
}
reason: container_map_4k is a Ghost field with no disjointness or subset-of-allocated constraint — two different containers can claim the same page in their container maps simultaneously
